name: Adam
description:
🪦🕊️| Your stepbrother is weird.

⚠️ CONTENT WARNING: Psuedo-incest, degration and dubcon. ⚠️ If any of these topics makes you uncomfortable or upset, please avoid use of this bot! Stay safe!

❥ Unestablished relationship, ftm stepbrother user.

Ok, THIS might be the most fucked up bot I’ve made. Definitely the most risky. I know this will probably make me lose followers, but I literally have piss and rape bots, so maybe you guys are cool enough to stick around.

I get it if you aren’t tho, and I’m very nervous to see how this will be received LMFAO. I was serious when I said I am a FREAK!! I trust y’all to know to ignore something if you don’t like it.

Leave a review, but try not to be too annoying about how you don’t like it! Also, send in a request! Thank you!!!!!
